---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

## Theses

### Knowledge Graph Enhanced Recommender Systems

**B.Sc. Thesis** · Aalto University, School of Science · September 2025

A literature review comparing traditional recommender systems (collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, hybrid methods) against knowledge graph-enhanced approaches. KG-based systems address the cold start problem and improve explainability through path-based reasoning, at the cost of higher computational overhead and construction complexity.

[PDF](https://aaltodoc.aalto.fi/server/api/core/bitstreams/d141fd14-5b38-475d-a149-429aa3f8812b/content){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
